rationale: Y independently verifies both the direct-loader and delegated-loader (AutoWeightsLoader) code paths against upstream vLLM with concrete file:line evidence, echoes the human reviewer's fake-param/real-checkpoint test-coverage concern almost verbatim, and explicitly flags that hunyuan_image3_transformer.py (the diffusion loader) was a known-affected caller dropped from scope — precisely the latent gap later fixed under #4891/#4808. X's review is repeated identically three times, its two comments (a dead-code None-guard nit and a plea not to delete the test file) are valid but marginal and don't engage with the loader-correctness distinctions or the missing call site, and its REQUEST CHANGES verdict is poorly calibrated against the PR's actual clean merge.
